# FTR10 Architect

## What this repo is

This repository is the **standalone FTR10 Architect theme engine** for VS Code /
code-server. It is no longer bundled with the old Markdown Preview Aces Edition
(MPE) / Crossnote extension. It contains only the code needed to build and install
the theme engine as a VS Code extension.

## Build, test, and lint commands

- Extension build: `npm run build` (esbuild → `out/native/extension.js`)
- Extension watch: `npm run watch` (esbuild watch mode)
- Type-check only: `npm run typecheck` (`tsc --noEmit`)
- Lint: `npm run lint` (`eslint "src/**/*.ts"`)
- Format: `npm run format` (`prettier --write "src/**/*.ts"`)
- Package for distribution: `vsce package` (or rely on `vscode:prepublish` → `npm run build`)

## High-level architecture

- `src/extension.ts` is the activation entrypoint. VS Code calls `activate(context)`
  / `deactivate()`; it forwards to `activateThemeSync(context)` / `deactivateThemeSync()`.
- `src/theme-sync.ts` re-exports the public surface (`activateThemeSync`,
  `deactivateThemeSync`, `accentDerived`, `ThemePreset`) so the entrypoint and
  `src/theme-presets/*` keep importing a single module.
- `src/theme-sync/*` holds the split engine:
  - `activation.ts` — activation, sidebar webview provider, command handlers, workbench patch (`patchWorkbench`), shim/vars regeneration, trace log.
  - `config.ts` — load/persist `~/.ftr10/theme.json`, flatten, migrate, rebuild CSS files.
  - `css.ts` — write token colors, terminal colors, `colors.css`.
  - `shim.ts` — generate the injected `shim.js` (inlined CSS + Thpace + context menu + vars polling).
  - `presets.ts` / `constants.ts` / `types.ts` / `state.ts` / `webview-html.ts` — presets, defaults, shared types/state, sidebar & editor webview HTML.
- `src/theme-presets/*` — the static theme presets (each exports a `ThemePreset`).
  They import `{ ThemePreset, accentDerived }` from `../theme-sync`.

## Key conventions

- Runtime artifacts live in the profile dir (defaults to `~/.ftr10`): `theme.json`,
  `vars.json`, `shim.js`, `css.files/`, `fonts/`, `backgrounds/`, `terminal-colors.zsh`,
  and `logs/ftr10-trace.log`. These are regenerated by the extension at runtime —
  do not edit them by hand; change the source and let the engine regenerate them.
- The extension bundles against `chokidar` (the only runtime dependency). `vscode`
  is external (injected by the host) and must never be required outside the host.
- `package.json` is the single source of truth for contributed commands, views,
  themes, and configuration. The only commands are `themeSync.patchWorkbench` and
  `themeSync.applyPreset`; the only view container is `themeSync` (activitybar) with
  the `themeSync.sidebar` webview.
- Do not reintroduce the MPE/Crossnote markdown-preview code here. This repo is the
  theme engine only.
